Türkçe

KHAS Theater Department Summer Camp will be held this year on July 24-25, 2023!

The quota for the free summer camp is 100 people. 100 people will be divided into four groups in total and a three-hour workshop will be held with each group at Stage KHAS (Kadir Has University – Cibali Campus).

The group’s day and time information will be announced via e-mail to personal contact addresses after registration is completed. (The form will be closed to participation after the first 100 people.)

You can apply for Summer Camp by filling out the form below:

https://form.khas.edu.tr/tiyatro
